nameJa: 国税の納税証明書（その3）
noteEn: Issued by your local Tax Office (税務署). Covers all 5 tax types: withholding income tax, self-assessed income tax, consumption tax, inheritance tax, and gift tax. Form 3 certifies no outstanding obligations as of the certificate date — no period specification needed. Submit certificates for all 5 tax types.
noteJa: 住所地を管轄する税務署から発行。源泉所得税、申告所得税、消費税・地方消費税、相続税、贈与税の5税目全ての納税証明書を提出。未納がないことを確認してください。
